name: minecast
title: Minecast
description: Quickly view the status of Minecraft servers!

commands.name: add-server
commands.title: Add Server
commands.description: Add a server IP to your list.
commands.subtitle: Minecast

commands.name: server-list
commands.title: Server List
commands.subtitle: Minecast
commands.description: View and manage your saved Minecraft servers.

commands.name: quick-check
commands.title: Quick Check
commands.subtitle: Minecast
commands.description: Quickly check the status of a server without saving.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: Dori7os
